_publications._publicationTitle: Destabilizing NF1 variants act in a dominant negative manner through neurofibromin dimerization.

_contextSnippet: we successfully introduced a fluorescent epitope-tagged (HA-mScarlet) WT and L847P NF1 which was expressed in a Dox dose-dependent manner
details: Successfully enabled doxycycline-inducible expression of full-length NF1 in a dose-dependent manner, overcoming previous limitations with TRE3G promoter silencing
